name: Aniracetam
description: Compound with anti-depressive properties used as a mental performance enhancer.
pharmacodynamics: Aniracetam possesses a wide range of anxiolytic properties, which may be mediated by an interaction between cholinergic, dopaminergic and serotonergic systems.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Aniracetam.
